creator: boris@tagnet.ru
text:
Hello!

Yes, I know, but sorry, I'm in troubles in my private life :( If someone 
will supply the patch I'll be glad to test and approve it.
> Maintainer of net-p2p/amule2,
>
> Please note that PR ports/125594 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125594
>
>   
Regards,
    Boris
